body:
## Required Task Fields

```yaml
lane: governance_tooling
intelligence_level: frontier
reason: "Fixture proves Markdown inline-code formatting around allowed_paths is not treated as a literal path character."
durable_source_of_truth: "GitHub issue #263"
objective: "Accept Markdown code ticks around path scope fields."
allowed_paths:
  - `scripts/asgk_lib/common.py`
  - `examples/work_unit.backtick-allowed-paths.json`
  - `examples/work_unit.backtick-allowed-paths.txt`
expected_output:
  - one focused validation PR
plan:
  - normalize path formatting
checklist:
  - work-unit check passes
acceptance_sheet:
  - backtick-wrapped allowed paths match changed paths
non_goals:
  - no authorization semantics change
stop_conditions:
  - outside allowed path passes unexpectedly
rollback_expectations:
  - revert PR
```
